content.full_text:
March 29, 1990

Mr. John Rothman, Attorney  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Mr. Rothman:

This letter will serve to confirm our conversation of this date regarding the use of campaign funds for Senator Paul Carpenter's legal defense.

You advised me that funds raised for the Carpenter Campaign Committee (ID# 890154 - 1990 election) may be used to pay for legal expenses incurred by Senator Carpenter to defend actions associated with his elected office.

I further understand that no new "defense fund" committee need be established, and that "defense" and "campaign" funds may be commingled and used for defense and/or campaign purposes. I am aware of the fact that the Proposition 68/73 campaign donation limitations apply to the Carpenter Campaign Committee.

I would greatly appreciate your confirmation of the above information.

Thanks very much for your help.

Sincerely,

Ann M. Peifer  
Deputy to Paul Carpenter
